title: Session 09 — Ambushed
bodyText:
# What happened
They won by keeping their distance. Deeper: thicker vines; **Brolin and Eddy inhaled spores** and heard a warning to *leave*. They found an old stone building by an underground river and camped. A curious **myconid** watched them — then began floating: engulfed by a nearly invisible, ancient, 15-foot **gelatinous cube**. Felson woke just in time.
